spec_match.rationale: Provides live access to the Web Serial API (navigator.serial.requestPort and getPorts) with Bluetooth service UUID filtering as specified in the Android RFCOMM serial support spec.

interactive.rationale: Includes active buttons to trigger the platform port chooser chooser and write text input directly to the selected port with live console logging.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds well with the blurb, demonstrating capability probing and requesting the serial port.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes fallbacks and clear status logs when Web Serial is missing or user blocks/cancels the port chooser.

references.rationale: Properly links back to the milestone feature index and the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Uses the design system layout, variables, and maintains correct AA color contrast.

summary: A fully compliant and solid baseline exploration of Web Serial over Bluetooth, displaying live UA platform data and executing real API requests.
